abstract:
Service robots are poised for enormous impact helping to achieve the U.N Sustainable Development goals as well as supporting older adults and young learners. This article briefly explores these application areas in three invited commentaries written by leading scholars and an industry entrepreneur, expressing their varied perspectives on the future of service robots. The article accompanies this
                    Journal of Service Research
                    special issue on human-robot interactions. In their commentaries, the authors share views on areas of personal interest ranging from global grand challenges to healthy aging and educational development. Included within each commentary are managerial insights and suggestions for needed research in the highlighted area.

affiliation: Marketing, Arizona State University, Tempe, AZ, USA
authors_full.name: Martin Mende

affiliation: Computer science, University of Maryland, College Park, MD, USA
authors_full.name: Ben Shneiderman

ur.ai_reason: 综述性评论文章，讨论HRI应用领域，非实证研究
ur.tldr: 服务机器人有望在联合国可持续发展目标、老年照护和青少年教育领域发挥重要作用。三位学者和一位企业家从各自视角发表评论，探讨服务机器人的发展前景，并提出相关管理建议和研究方向。

title: Commentary: The Future of Human-Robot Interactions
